blockers.title: Canonical/og:url acceptance is not met on all routes
blockers.evidence: Acceptance criterion 7 says canonical URLs and og:url must be on every page. Base only emits them when `path` is supplied (`src/layouts/Base.astro:22`, `src/layouts/Base.astro:46-47`). `/portal`, `/verify`, and `/404` pass `noindex` but no `path` (`src/pages/portal/index.astro:6-10`, `src/pages/verify/index.astro:6-10`, `src/pages/404.astro:10-14`), so they render without canonical or og:url. The site origin is also duplicated in `src/layouts/Base.astro:18` and `astro.config.mjs:51`, not a single shared constant as specified.
blockers.required_fix: Provide `path` for the missing routes or otherwise guarantee canonical/og:url from Base, and move the site origin into one shared constant used by both Astro config and page metadata.

blockers.title: New legal-page metadata invents copy outside the vault
blockers.evidence: The repo requires verbatim vault-sourced copy. The new meta descriptions are member/search-facing strings but are not present in the vault: `src/pages/privacy.astro:12-13`, `src/pages/safeguarding.astro:11-12`, and `src/pages/terms.astro:12-13`. `rg` found no exact matches in `/Users/ismac/Documents/Projects/WAI`; the closest vault text is different (`02 Privacy Policy & Guardian Consent (Draft).md:26`, `01 Under-18 Launch Copy (Drafts).md:93`).
blockers.required_fix: Replace the meta descriptions with complete, unaltered sentences from the governing vault notes, or add the exact metadata copy to the vault before shipping.

blockers.title: E2E acceptance for the 404 page is not actually delivered
blockers.evidence: Acceptance criterion 12 requires the new E2E to assert that the 404 page renders. The test only checks that `dist/404.html` exists (`tests/e2e/trust-pages.spec.ts:89-92`); it never navigates to a missing route or asserts the visible 404 message/links from `src/pages/404.astro:21-32`.
blockers.required_fix: Change the E2E to request an unknown route or `/404.html` through Playwright and assert the rendered H1/message and Home/Join/Contact links.

non_blocking_notes: No added em/en dashes were found in added user-facing diff lines.
I did not run the build or E2E suite because this review environment is read-only and those commands write build/test artifacts.

spec_compliance.criterion: /privacy page from vault, styled, no draft banner
spec_compliance.evidence: Body mostly tracks the amended vault, and POLICY_VERSION is 2026-07-02, but the page metadata description is invented copy rather than verbatim vault text.
Visible body and /privacy link are present, but the page metadata description is invented copy rather than verbatim vault text.
EN and AR footers link internally to /privacy, /safeguarding, and /terms.

spec_compliance.criterion: UX-1 noscript and verify timeout state
spec_compliance.evidence: /join, /portal, /verify have noscript messages; VerifyApp adds an 8s slow-state fallback.
public/robots.txt allows the site, disallows /portal and /verify, and points to the sitemap index.
@astrojs/sitemap is configured with a filter excluding URLs containing /portal and /verify.

spec_compliance.criterion: Canonical URLs + og:url on every page from a single site constant
spec_compliance.evidence: /portal, /verify, and /404 omit path so Base emits neither canonical nor og:url; the site URL is duplicated between Base and astro.config.

spec_compliance.criterion: hreflang EN/AR alternates on six page pairs
spec_compliance.evidence: The six EN pages and six AR pages pass reciprocal path/alternate props to Base.
Both private routes pass `noindex` to Base.
src/pages/404.astro contains the plain-language message and Home/Join/Contact links.

spec_compliance.criterion: Organization JSON-LD on EN and AR home pages
spec_compliance.evidence: Both home pages include Organization JSON-LD with name, url, logo, parentOrganization, sameAs, and email.
Privacy, safeguarding, robots, and sitemap assertions exist, but 404 render is not asserted, only dist/404.html existence.

spec_compliance.criterion: No copy invention on new pages
spec_compliance.evidence: New meta descriptions for privacy, safeguarding, and terms do not appear verbatim in the vault.

summary: The main product/security surfaces are mostly in place, but this cannot ship while the metadata contract is incomplete, vault-source rules are violated by invented legal-page descriptions, and a required E2E acceptance check is only testing a file artifact instead of rendered behavior.
